author: w3Lb
content: Plan: 0.2.9 -> 0.3.0 (minor bump — Unreleased contains breaking changes: exit-code taxonomy, Op::Replace/Delete construction fields, engine::apply RangeSpec signature, ApplyOptions.range). Update workspace.package.version + the four internal workspace.dependencies versions, retitle CHANGELOG Unreleased as 0.3.0 dated 2026-06-09, refresh Cargo.lock, full test/clippy/fmt verification, single commit. Also delete stray gitignored *.ripsed.lock sentinels left by dogfooding runs on the manifests.
